summary: This is a brief announcement post directing readers to Cathy O'Neil's Bloomberg column where she argues that Donald Trump represents a kind of political singularity. The post itself contains no substantive argument, serving only as a pointer to the external piece. The actual analysis and arguments are contained in the linked Bloomberg article rather than this blog entry.
key_points: Post serves as announcement for Bloomberg column
The provocative title 'Donald Trump is the Singularity' suggests a comparison between Trump and the AI concept of technological singularity
No substantive content is present in the blog post itself
key_insight: This is a redirect post with no analyzable content beyond its provocative title linking Trump to the concept of singularity.
